meaning: n.种子,萌芽,原由,根据,子孙,精液vt.播种,结实,成熟,去...籽vi.结实,播种
examples: Small particles adhere to the seed.
The plant can be propagated from seed.
At Chiron three seed strains are injected separately into fertilized eggs chosen under strict rules.
Nelson still sometimes keeps some of his seed, but not usually, and not much.
